description: Atomics.notify cross-realm promise resolution bug - js::atomics_notify_impl in js/src/builtin/AtomicsObject.cpp walks the waiter list from a SharedArrayBuffer and resolves each waitAsync promise without first entering the promise's realm. Waiter lists can contain promises from multiple realms, so Atomics.notify in one realm can resolve a promise allocated in another realm with the wrong active compartment. ASAN/debug builds crash on a compartment-mismatch check; release builds can mutate PromiseObject state and run write barriers under a foreign realm context, corrupting realm-bound GC state. The fix enters each promise's realm with AutoRealm immediately before PromiseObject::resolve and includes the needed Realm inline header.

fixes.description: Bug 2013562: Enter correct realm before resolving same-thread
